title: Profile
emptyBio: Your bio is empty, say something about yourself.
name: Name
oldOrNewPasswordRequired: Old password and new password cannot be empty.
deleteAccountDescription: This permanently deletes the unified SSO account used by WalkCalc, signs you out on this device, and may remove access to other developer-operated services that use the same account. Shared WalkCalc ledger history needed by other group members is kept with your account identity removed. This action cannot be undone.
accountDeletedDescription: Your account has been deleted. You can close this page and return to the app.
accountDeletedCloseHint: If this page does not close automatically, use the app or browser close control.
